LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PEREMPTORY WRIT AND/OR ALTERNATIVE WRITS IS DENIED. PETITIONER IS UNLIKELY TO PREVAIL ON THE MERITS AND THE BALANCE OF THE PREJUDICE IN DISRUPTING THE SCHOOL YEAR WEIGHS STRONGLY AGAINST GRANTING INTERIM RELIEF. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-08-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

calendar.matters:
Petitioner'S Order To Show Cause Re: Peremptory And/Or Alternative Writs
Off Calendar Sep-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patrick D. Goggin, 981-9290, appearing for petitioner and moving party
Robin B. Johansen of Remcho, Johansen & Purcell, LLP, 510-346-6200, appearing for respondent and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PEREMPTORY WRIT AND/OR ALTERNATIVE WRITS. Request/Relief is denied. Petitioner is unlikely to prevail on the merits and the balance of the prejudice in disrupting the school year weighs strongly against granting interim relief. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
